---
title: "White Faced Ibis in the Bear River Migratory Bird Refuge, UT"
format: dashboard
editor: visual
author: "Alastair Buddin"
---

```{r}
#| message: false
library("tidyverse")
library("janitor")
nest_data_rough <- read.csv("C:/Users/apbb0/OneDrive - Montana State University/STAT408/Project/wfib.ns.data_data_release.csv")
nest_data = clean_names(nest_data_rough)  
```

##
